'''Toat''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] who served as a top-ranking official in the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] on [[Maramere]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].

In [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]], [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] Toat was killed by [[Sol Sixxa]]'s [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] aboard the pleasure liner ''[[Syren]]'', before the pirates scuttled the ship. His underling, [[Harro Ruuk]], took over his job.

{{Char-stub}}
